name: Accordion
description: A vertically stacked set of collapsible sections, each with a trigger and an animated content panel.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style for this item. Overrides the variant inherited from the parent Accordion when set.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style applied to every item. Each AccordionItem can override it locally with its own `variant`. Defaults to `"default"`.

props.name: indicator
props.description: Built-in collapse/expand indicator placement. - `"chevron"` (default) — down arrow when collapsed, up arrow when open. - `"plus-minus"` — plus glyph when collapsed, minus when open. - `"none"` — suppress the built-in indicator; supply your own as the last child of the trigger (tag it `data-slot="accordion-trigger-icon"` to inherit sizing).

name: Activity Feed
description: A presentational, scrollable list of timestamped activity entries with status dots and relative times.

props.name: items
props.description: Ordered list of activity entries to display.

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the scrollable viewport. Accepts any CSS value (`"320px"`, `"100%"`, …) or a bare number treated as pixels. Defaults to `320`.

props.name: emptyState
props.description: Node rendered when `items` is empty. Defaults to a centred muted "No activity yet" message.

props.name: renderItem
props.description: Escape hatch for full row customisation. When provided, it replaces the default row renderer entirely; `data-slot="activity-feed-item"` is still your responsibility inside the returned node.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes merged onto the root `ScrollArea`.

name: Alert Dialog
description: Blocking confirmation dialog that requires the user to make a choice before continuing.

name: Alert
description: Inline feedback banner for status messages, warnings, and errors.

name: AspectRatio
description: Container that enforces a fixed width-to-height ratio on its content.

props.name: ratio
props.description: Width-to-height ratio as a plain number (e.g. `16 / 9`, `4 / 3`, `1`). Passed to the `--ratio` CSS custom property consumed by `aspect-(--ratio)`.

name: Autocomplete
description: Optional arrow that visually connects the popup to its anchor.

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment of the popup against its anchor (default `"start"`).

props.name: alignOffset
props.description: Offset in pixels along the alignment axis (default `0`).

props.name: anchor
props.description: Custom anchor element to position against instead of the input.

props.name: showBackdrop
props.description: Render an AutocompleteBackdrop behind the popup.

props.name: side
props.description: Preferred side to place the popup (default `"bottom"`).

props.name: sideOffset
props.description: Gap in pixels between the popup and its anchor (default `4`).

name: Avatar
description: Rounded user-identity image with automatic fallback text.

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset that cascades to every sub-part via `data-size`. Controls the avatar's width/height: `"xs"` (20px) · `"sm"` (24px) · `"default"` (32px) · `"lg"` (40px) · `"xl"` (48px).

name: Badge
description: Small status label used to categorise, tag, or annotate content.

props.name: dismissible
props.description: When `true`, appends a dismiss `<button>` containing Cancel01Icon.

props.name: dot
props.description: When `true`, prepends a small leading dot before children (and before `iconLeft`). The dot colour tracks `currentColor` (`bg-current`) so it inherits the variant's text colour automatically.

props.name: dotClassName
props.description: Extra Tailwind classes merged onto the leading dot `<span>`.

props.name: iconLeft
props.description: Icon rendered immediately before children.

props.name: iconRight
props.description: Icon rendered immediately after children.

props.name: mono
props.description: When `true`, applies `font-mono uppercase tracking-wide` for monospaced label styling — useful for version numbers, codes, or IDs.

props.name: onDismiss
props.description: Called when the dismiss button is clicked.

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset applied via badgeVariants. `"xs"` through `"xl"`; controls height, padding, and font size.

props.name: variant
props.description: Colour and emphasis style applied via badgeVariants. Includes solid fills, tinted `*-light` fills, bordered `*-outline` variants, `ghost`, and `link`.

name: Banner
description: Root container for the composable Banner.

name: Bar List
description: A horizontal ranked bar list — labels overlaid on value-proportional bars, with the formatted value in a trailing column.

props.name: data
props.description: Rows to render.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Makes rows interactive and fires with the clicked row.

props.name: sortOrder
props.description: Sort direction by value. Defaults to `"descending"`.

props.name: valueFormatter
props.description: Formats the trailing value.

name: Breadcrumb
description: Accessible navigation landmark that shows the user's location in the site hierarchy.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls text size and gap across all descendant breadcrumb parts.

props.name: separator
props.description: Default separator node rendered between every BreadcrumbItem when the caller omits explicit `<BreadcrumbSeparator>` elements. Forwarded via React context so each `BreadcrumbSeparator` can fall back to it.

name: Bulk Action Bar
description: Floating toolbar that appears when one or more table / list rows are selected, exposing bulk actions and a way to clear the selection.

props.name: selectedCount
props.description: Number of currently-selected items, shown as `"N selected"`.

props.name: onClearSelection
props.description: Called when the user presses the clear-selection (×) button.

props.name: actions
props.description: Action buttons rendered in the toolbar.

props.name: position
props.description: Positioning strategy.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class names merged onto the root element.

props.name: children
props.description: Extra content rendered between the selected-count label and the action buttons. Use this slot for supplementary controls (e.g. a "Select all" checkbox).

name: Button Group
description: A toolbar-style container that fuses a set of related controls into a single visual unit.

name: Button
description: The primary interactive control for actions and navigation.

name: Calendar RAC
description: Single-date calendar built on React Aria Components.

name: Calendar With Presets
description: A day-picker calendar with a sidebar of quick-select presets.

props.name: mode
props.description: The mode of the calendar.

props.name: selected
props.description: The selected date or date range.

props.name: onSelect
props.type: | ((date: Date | undefined) => void) | ((range: DateRange | undefined) => void)
props.description: Callback fired when the date or date range changes.

props.name: className
props.description: The class name for the root element.

props.name: presets
props.description: Custom presets to show in the sidebar. If not provided, default presets will be used.

props.name: disableFutureDates
props.description: Whether to disable future dates.

name: Calendar
description: A styled date-picker calendar built on top of `react-day-picker`'s `DayPicker`.

props.name: buttonVariant
props.description: Button `variant` applied to the previous/next navigation buttons. Defaults to `"ghost"`.

name: Card Checkbox
description: Grid wrapper that spaces a collection of CardCheckboxItem components with a consistent gap.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional icon rendered to the left of the label and description; dimmed via `text-muted-foreground` when the item is disabled.

props.name: label
props.description: Primary text for the card; rendered as a `<span>` linked to the checkbox via `aria-labelledby`.

props.name: description
props.description: Supporting text rendered below the label; also linked to the checkbox via `aria-describedby` when `id` is provided.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the Checkbox and applies `cursor-not-allowed` styling to the card via the CVA `disabled` variant.

name: Card
description: A surface that groups related content and actions into a bordered container.

props.name: size
props.description: Spacing preset that cascades to all sub-parts via `data-size`. - `"sm"` — gap-3 / py-3; header/content `px-3`; footer `px-3 py-2`. - `"default"` — gap-4 / py-4; header/content `px-4`; footer `px-4 py-2.5`. - `"lg"` — gap-6 / py-6; header/content `px-6`; footer `px-6 py-3.5`.

name: Carousel
description: Accessible, touch-friendly carousel built on Embla Carousel.

props.name: opts
props.description: Embla options forwarded directly to `useEmblaCarousel`.

props.name: plugins
props.description: Embla plugins (e.g. autoplay, wheel gestures).

props.name: orientation
props.description: Scroll axis — `"horizontal"` (default) or `"vertical"`.

props.name: setApi
props.description: Callback that receives the Embla API instance once it is ready. Use this to call imperative methods (e.g. `api.scrollTo(index)`).

name: Chart Empty State
description: Centered empty state for charts and data panels that have no content.

props.name: icon
props.description: Hugeicons icon value rendered in the icon tile.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional bold-ish heading rendered above the message.

props.name: message
props.description: Required muted body copy that explains why no data is available.

props.name: action
props.description: Optional call-to-action rendered below the message.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls the overall visual scale of the empty state.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional Tailwind class names merged onto the root element.

name: Chart
description: Root wrapper for the data-driven chart components.

props.name: cartesianGridProps
props.description: Props forwarded to the recharts `CartesianGrid` element.

props.name: colors
props.description: Ordered palette; cycles when shorter than the number of series.

props.name: config
props.description: Per-series ChartConfig; series are derived from its keys.

props.name: containerHeight
props.description: Pixel height of the chart canvas. Defaults to 200 (mobile) / 370.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of data rows.

props.name: dataKey
props.description: Field used for the category axis labels.

props.name: defaultSelectedSeries
props.description: Uncontrolled initial selected series. Defaults to `null`.

props.name: displayEdgeLabelsOnly
props.description: Render only the first and last X-axis labels.

props.name: hideGridLines
props.description: Hides the CartesianGrid when `true`.

props.name: hideXAxis
props.description: Hides the XAxis when `true`.

props.name: hideYAxis
props.description: Hides the YAxis when `true`.

props.name: intervalType
props.description: Axis tick interval strategy.

props.name: layout
props.description: Chart orientation — see ChartLayout.

props.name: legend
props.description: `true` for the default interactive legend, or custom recharts content.

props.name: legendProps
props.description: Extra props forwarded to the recharts `Legend` element.

props.name: onSelectedSeriesChange
props.description: Fires when the selection changes (legend click, bar click, or selector).

props.name: selectedSeries
props.description: Controlled selected series (the isolated/highlighted one, or `null`). Share this with a ChartSeriesSelector `value` so a header selector and the in-chart interactive legend stay in sync.

props.name: tooltip
props.description: `true` for the default styled tooltip, or a custom recharts content.

props.name: tooltipProps
props.type: Omit<TooltipProps, "content"> & { hideLabel?: boolean; labelSeparator?: boolean; hideIndicator?: boolean; indicator?: "line" | "dot" | "dashed"; nameKey?: string; labelKey?: string; }
props.description: Extra props forwarded to the recharts `Tooltip` element.

props.name: type
props.description: Stacking behaviour — see ChartType.

props.name: valueFormatter
props.description: Formats numeric value-axis ticks and tooltip values.

props.name: xAxisProps
props.description: Extra props forwarded to the recharts `XAxis` element.

props.name: yAxisProps
props.description: Extra props forwarded to the recharts `YAxis` element.

props.name: payload
props.description: Recharts legend payload injected automatically by the `Legend` wrapper.

props.name: hideIcon
props.description: When `true`, suppresses the color icon/dot for each legend entry.

props.name: nameKey
props.description: Data key used to look up the series label in ChartConfig.

props.name: allowDeselect
props.description: Clicking the active series clears the selection. Defaults to `true`.

props.name: colors
props.description: Palette for the color dots; cycles when shorter than the series count.

props.name: config
props.description: Per-series ChartConfig; one toggle is rendered per key.

props.name: data
props.description: Data rows used to compute each series' total when `showTotal`.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial selection. Defaults to `null`.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires with the new selection (or `null` when cleared).

props.name: series
props.description: Restrict and order the rendered series. Defaults to `Object.keys(config)`.

props.name: showTotal
props.description: Render each series' summed total beneath its label (dashboard style).

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled selected series key, or `null` for none.

props.name: valueFormatter
props.description: Formats the per-series total. Defaults to `toLocaleString`.

props.name: displayEdgeLabelsOnly
props.description: Render only the first and last tick labels, hiding all intermediate ones.

props.name: intervalType
props.description: Recharts tick interval strategy forwarded to the `XAxis` primitive.

name: Charts
description: Config-driven multi-series area chart.

props.name: areaProps
props.description: Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<Area>`.

props.name: chartProps
props.description: Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<AreaChart>`.

props.name: connectNulls
props.description: Join across null gaps instead of breaking the area.

props.name: fillType
props.description: Fill treatment beneath each area. Defaults to `"gradient"`.

props.name: barCategoryGap
props.description: Gap between bar groups (categories) in pixels.

props.name: barGap
props.description: Gap between individual bars within a group in pixels.

props.name: barProps
props.description: Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<Bar>`.

props.name: barRadius
props.description: Border-radius applied to the top corners of each bar.

props.name: barSize
props.description: Fixed width in pixels for each bar.

props.name: chartProps
props.description: Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<BarChart>`.

props.name: chartProps
props.description: Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<LineChart>`.

props.name: connectNulls
props.description: Join across null gaps instead of breaking the line.

props.name: lineProps
props.description: Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<Line>`.

props.name: chartProps
props.description: Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<PieChart>`.

props.name: label
props.description: Centre label text for the donut variant. Defaults to the value sum.

props.name: nameKey
props.description: Data key used as the slice name (maps rows to `config` entries).

props.name: pieProps
props.description: Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<Pie>`.

props.name: showLabel
props.description: Show the centre label (donut variant only).

props.name: variant
props.description: `"pie"` (solid) or `"donut"` (hollow centre). Defaults to `"pie"`.

name: Checkbox Tree
description: A headless, renderless checkbox tree that manages tri-state (checked / unchecked / indeterminate) selection across a nested TreeNode hierarchy.

props.name: tree
props.description: Root TreeNode whose entire hierarchy is rendered and managed.

props.name: renderNode
props.type: (props: { node: TreeNode; isChecked: boolean | "indeterminate"; onCheckedChange: () => void; children: React.ReactNode; }) => React.ReactNode
props.description: Render-prop called for every node in the tree.

name: Checkbox
description: A binary toggle control that indicates a checked or unchecked state.

name: Code Block Command
description: A package-manager command block with tabs for npm, pnpm, yarn, and bun, a copy button that copies the active manager's command, and persistent manager selection via `localStorage`.

props.name: bun
props.description: Explicit bun command — overrides the derived value when `npm` is also provided.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes merged onto the outermost element.

props.name: npm
props.description: The npm command (used as-is for the `npm` tab and as the derivation source).

props.name: onCopySuccess
props.description: Called after the active command has been written to the clipboard.

props.name: pnpm
props.description: Explicit pnpm command — overrides the derived value when `npm` is also provided.

props.name: prompt
props.description: An AI-assistant instruction shown in an extra "AI" tab.

props.name: storageKey
props.description: `localStorage` key used to persist the user's package-manager preference.

props.name: yarn
props.description: Explicit yarn command — overrides the derived value when `npm` is also provided.

name: Code Block
description: Read-only code display surface with Shiki-powered syntax highlighting, an optional language label, line numbers, and a clipboard copy button.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class names applied to the root element.

props.name: code
props.description: The source code string to display.

props.name: copyable
props.description: When `true` (the default) a CopyButton appears in the top bar. Pass `false` to suppress it.

props.name: language
props.description: Language used both for the top-bar label and Shiki syntax highlighting (e.g. `"tsx"`, `"ruby"`, `"go"`, `"bash"`). Unknown languages fall back to plain text. Omit to render unhighlighted text.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Constrains the code body height. Accepts any CSS `max-height` value (e.g. `400`, `"50vh"`). A numeric value is treated as pixels.

props.name: showLineNumbers
props.description: When `true`, a numbered gutter is rendered to the left of each line.

props.name: wrap
props.description: When `true`, long lines wrap and break at word boundaries instead of scrolling horizontally.

name: Collapsible
description: A lightweight single-panel show/hide container driven by a trigger.

name: Command Menu
description: A ⌘K command palette that combines the design-system CommandDialog with a global hotkey from `react-hotkeys-hook`.

props.name: groups
props.description: Groups of items rendered inside the palette.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state; when provided alongside `onOpenChange` the parent fully owns open/close.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when the palette requests an open-state change.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown in the search input.

props.name: hotkey
props.description: Global hotkey that toggles the palette. Uses `react-hotkeys-hook` notation — `"mod"` maps to `⌘` on macOS and `Ctrl` on Windows/Linux.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Optional element rendered outside the dialog; clicking it opens the palette. Typically a `<Button>` or an `<kbd>` hint.

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Message shown by CommandEmpty when no items match the current query.

name: Command
description: A keyboard-navigable command palette built on the `cmdk` primitive.

name: Config Row
description: A single label/value row for settings panels, detail drawers, and info grids.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional leading icon rendered at size 14 in `text-muted-foreground`.

props.name: label
props.description: Muted label displayed on the left side of the row.

props.name: value
props.description: The value shown on the right side, rendered in `font-mono text-xs` by default. Ignored when `children` is provided.

props.name: description
props.description: Optional second muted line rendered below `label` in a smaller size.

props.name: action
props.description: Optional trailing action node (e.g. a CopyButton or Button) pinned to the far right of the row.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the root `div` element.

props.name: children
props.description: When provided, used as the value content in place of the `value` prop. Rendered identically — wrapped in a `font-mono text-xs` span.

name: Context Menu
description: Right-click (or long-press) contextual menu anchored to an arbitrary region of the page.

name: Copy Button
description: Icon button that copies a string to the clipboard and shows a transient checkmark as confirmation.

props.name: text
props.description: The string written to the clipboard when the button is pressed.

props.name: timeout
props.description: How long, in ms, the "copied" state persists before reverting.

props.name: onCopied
props.description: Called after a successful copy, useful for analytics or toasts.

name: Credenza
description: Responsive overlay that renders as a centred Dialog on desktop (`>= 768 px`) and as a bottom Drawer on mobile.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state; pair with onOpenChange.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when the overlay requests an open/close transition.

name: DataGrid
description: Root component for the DataGrid system.

props.name: column
props.description: The TanStack Table column to filter.

props.name: options
props.type: { /** Display label. */ label: string; /** Filter value matched against `getFacetedUniqueValues`. */ value: string; /** Optional icon component. */ icon?: React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }>; }[]
props.description: List of filterable option values.

props.name: title
props.description: Display title for the trigger button and search input placeholder.

props.name: column
props.description: The TanStack Table column instance.

props.name: filter
props.description: Optional filter node rendered as the first item in the column dropdown.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional icon rendered before the title.

props.name: pinnable
props.description: Whether pinning is supported (passed through; read from tableLayout).

props.name: title
props.description: Display title; falls back to `meta.headerTitle`, string header, or `column.id`.

props.name: visibility
props.description: Whether to include a Columns visibility submenu. Default `false`.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Whether the grid is in a loading state.

props.name: props
props.description: The resolved merged props passed to DataGrid.

props.name: recordCount
props.description: Total record count (drives pagination info and empty-state checks).

props.name: table
props.description: The TanStack Table instance.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra class names on the root element.

props.name: ellipsisText
props.description: Ellipsis text. Default `"..."`.

props.name: info
props.description: Pagination info template string. Default `"{from} - {to} of {count}"`.

props.name: infoSkeleton
props.description: Skeleton shown for the info section while loading.

props.name: more
props.description: Whether to render grouped ellipsis page buttons. Default `false`.

props.name: moreLimit
props.description: Number of page buttons per group. Default `5`.

props.name: nextPageLabel
props.description: Aria-label for the next-page button. Default `"Go to next page"`.

props.name: previousPageLabel
props.description: Aria-label for the previous-page button. Default `"Go to previous page"`.

props.name: rowsPerPageLabel
props.description: Label for the rows-per-page control. Default `"Rows per page"`.

props.name: sizes
props.description: Available page-size options. Default `[5, 10, 25, 50, 100]`.

props.name: sizesDescription
props.description: Label after the page-size select. Default `"per page"`.

props.name: sizesInfo
props.description: Extra info shown next to the sizes select.

props.name: sizesLabel
props.description: Label before the page-size select. Default `"Show"`.

props.name: sizesSkeleton
props.description: Skeleton shown for the sizes section while loading.

props.name: allRowsLoadedMessage
props.description: Message shown in the virtual infinite-scroll footer once all rows are loaded.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the provider (all sub-components).

props.name: className
props.description: Extra class names on the outermost container (when using DataGridContainer).

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Message shown in the empty-state row when there is no data.

props.name: fetchingMoreMessage
props.description: Message shown in the virtual infinite-scroll footer while fetching more rows.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: When `true`, the grid is in a loading state.

props.name: loadingMessage
props.description: Custom content shown in the spinner overlay.

props.name: loadingMode
props.description: Controls whether loading renders skeleton rows (`"skeleton"`) or a centred spinner (`"spinner"`).

props.name: onRowClick
props.description: Called when a body row is clicked.

props.name: recordCount
props.description: Total number of records — used by pagination and empty-state checks.

props.name: table
props.description: The TanStack Table instance created by `useReactTable`.

props.name: tableClassNames
props.description: Class-name overrides for individual structural elements.

props.name: tableLayout
props.description: Feature-flag bag that controls layout and interactive column/row features.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the scroll area.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Which scroll axes to enable. Default `"both"`.

props.name: actions
props.description: Bulk action buttons rendered inside the toolbar. Each action's `onClick` is responsible for resetting selection if desired — the clear (×) button handles selection reset automatically.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class names forwarded to BulkActionBar.

props.name: children
props.description: Extra content rendered between the count label and the action buttons (forwarded to BulkActionBar's `children` slot).

props.name: row
props.description: The TanStack row whose actions are being exposed. Passed through to children via the `data-row-id` attribute for test selectors; the row itself is available to consumers via the surrounding closure.

props.name: children
props.description: DropdownMenuItem children rendered inside the menu. Compose `DropdownMenuItem`, `DropdownMenuSeparator`, `DropdownMenuLabel`, etc.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for the trigger button. Defaults to `"Row actions"`.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class names merged onto the trigger button.

props.name: estimateSize
props.description: Estimated row height in px. Default `48`.

props.name: fetchMoreOffset
props.description: Number of items from the end to trigger `onFetchMore`. Default `0`.

props.name: footerContent
props.description: Footer content.

props.name: hasMore
props.description: `false` = all loaded; `true` / `undefined` = more available.

props.name: height
props.description: Fixed height for a self-contained scroll container.

props.name: isFetchingMore
props.description: Whether a fetch is in progress (disables duplicate fetches). Default `false`.

props.name: onFetchMore
props.description: If provided, enables infinite scroll mode.

props.name: overscan
props.description: Number of rows to render outside the visible area. Default `10`.

props.name: renderHeader
props.description: Whether to render the header. Default `true`.

props.name: virtualizerOptions
props.description: Advanced virtualizer options.

name: Date Input
description: A three-segment MM/DD/YYYY inline date editor with keyboard navigation.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected date; the component mirrors this into its internal segment state on each render cycle.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with a fully valid `Date` whenever the user commits a change; not fired for partial or out-of-range inputs.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the outermost wrapper `<div>` that provides the border, background, and flex layout.

name: Date Picker With Month Year
description: A date picker with dropdown selectors for month and year navigation.

props.name: value
props.description: The current value (controlled).

props.name: onChange
props.description: Handler that is called when the value changes.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The default value (uncontrolled).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the date picker is disabled.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name for the container.

props.name: error
props.description: Error state for validation styling.

props.name: minValue
props.description: Minimum selectable date.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: Maximum selectable date.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text when no date is selected

name: Date Picker
description: A single-date picker that reveals a calendar in a popover.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected date; pass `undefined` to show the placeholder.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the selected `Date` (or `undefined`) when the user picks a day or clears the selection via the calendar.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the trigger button, preventing the calendar from opening.

props.name: isRequired
props.description: When `true`, appends a red asterisk to the label text.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional `<label>` rendered above the trigger button; linked via `htmlFor` to the button's generated id.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the outermost wrapper `<div>`.

props.name: error
props.description: When `true`, applies a destructive border to the trigger button.

name: Date Range Picker With Presets
description: A date-range picker with a preset sidebar and an explicit apply/reset flow.

props.name: value
props.description: The current value of the date range picker.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The default date range.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Handler that is called when the value changes.

props.name: label
props.description: The label for the date range picker.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name for the container.

name: Date Range Picker
description: An inline date-range picker composed from React Aria Components primitives.

props.name: value
props.description: The selected date range.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when the date range changes.

props.name: label
props.description: The label text for the date range picker.

props.name: className
props.description: The class name for the root element.

props.name: error
props.description: Indicates if the input has an error.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: The error message to display when the input has an error.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Indicates if the input is disabled.

name: Date Selector
description: A compact date filter that selects by day, month, quarter, half-year, or year with `is` / `before` / `after` / `between` operators. Reorders into a popover or dialog by wrapping it; the day view reuses Calendar and the coarser periods render their own grids.

props.name: allowRange
props.description: When `true` (default), enables the `between` range operator.

props.name: baseYear
props.description: Centre year for the generated year list. Defaults to the current year.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes for the root element.

props.name: dayDateFormat
props.description: `date-fns` format used to render and parse day values.

props.name: dayDateFormats
props.description: Extra `date-fns` formats accepted when parsing typed input.

props.name: defaultFilterType
props.description: The operator selected on first render. Defaults to `"is"`.

props.name: defaultPeriodType
props.description: The period selected on first render. Defaults to `"day"`.

props.name: i18n
props.description: Partial i18n overrides merged over the English defaults.

props.name: inputHint
props.description: When set, the input becomes editable and shows this hint while focused.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional heading rendered beside the operator tabs.

props.name: maxYear
props.description: Upper bound (inclusive) of the year list.

props.name: minYear
props.description: Lower bound (inclusive) of the year list.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called whenever the selection changes.

props.name: periodTypes
props.description: Restricts which period tabs are shown, in order.

props.name: presetMode
props.description: Locks the operator to a fixed value and disables the operator tabs.

props.name: showInput
props.description: When `true` (default), renders the text input above the picker.

props.name: showTwoMonths
props.description: When `true` (default), the day view shows two months on desktop.

props.name: value
props.description: The controlled selection.

props.name: weekStartsOn
props.description: First day of the week (0 = Sunday … 6 = Saturday).

props.name: yearRange
props.description: Number of years listed when `minYear`/`maxYear` are not set.

name: Date Field RAC
description: An accessible date field that renders each date part (year, month, day) as individually focusable, spinnable segments.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the React Aria `DateInput` element via `composeRenderProps`; appended after the default dateInputStyle classes (or all classes when `unstyled` is `true`).

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When `true`, suppresses the default dateInputStyle base classes so the container can be fully re-styled by the caller.

name: Description List
description: Semantic description list root (`<dl>`). Compose with DescriptionTerm and DescriptionDetails to build accessible key–value displays.

props.name: divided
props.description: Adds a subtle bottom border between rows (horizontal orientation only).

name: Detail Sheet
description: A right-anchored (by default) detail / inspection panel built as a structured recipe over the design-system Sheet.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the sheet is currently open.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Callback invoked whenever the sheet requests an open-state change. The first argument is the requested `open` value; forward it to your state setter to keep the sheet controlled.

props.name: title
props.description: Main heading rendered in a SheetTitle.

props.name: meta
props.description: Optional muted subtitle rendered beneath the title (e.g. a record ID or status chip). Mapped to `SheetDescription` so it doubles as the accessible description for screen readers.

props.name: footer
props.description: Optional sticky footer rendered via SheetFooter. Typically holds a primary action and a cancel/close control.

props.name: children
props.description: The scrollable body of the sheet. Typically composed of DetailSheetSection blocks each containing DetailSheetRow pairs.

props.name: side
props.description: Which screen edge the sheet slides in from. Forwarded directly to `SheetContent`'s `side` prop.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the `SheetContent` element.

props.name: label
props.description: Muted descriptor rendered on the left side of the row.

props.name: children
props.description: The value displayed on the right side, wrapped in `font-mono text-xs` styling by default. Pass a pre-styled node to override the wrapper.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the row's `flex` wrapper `<div>`.

props.name: heading
props.description: Section heading rendered as an uppercase muted `<h4>`. Keep it short — one or two words.

props.name: children
props.description: The section body; typically one or more DetailSheetRows.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the `<section>` element.

name: Dialog
description: Modal overlay that interrupts the user to focus on a single task or message.

name: direction
description: Re-exports Base UI's direction utilities for setting and reading the text directionality (`"ltr"` | `"rtl"`) of the component tree.

name: Drawer
description: Edge-anchored panel that slides in from any side of the viewport, powered by the Vaul library.

name: Dropdown Menu
description: Floating list of actions that opens from a trigger button.

name: Empty
description: Centred placeholder surface shown when a list or view has no content.

props.name: border
props.description: When `true` (the default) the root renders a `border border-dashed` outline, signalling the absence of real content. Pass `false` to suppress the border — useful when the empty state lives inside a card that already provides a boundary.

name: Execution Trace Bar
description: Horizontal stacked proportional bar that visualises time or value breakdown across labelled segments, with per-segment tooltips and an optional legend.

props.name: segments
props.description: Ordered list of segments to display in the bar.

props.name: total
props.description: Denominator for percentage calculations. Defaults to the sum of all segment values.

props.name: showLegend
props.description: Whether to render the segment legend below the bar.

props.name: formatValue
props.description: Formats a raw numeric value for display in tooltips and the legend.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls the height of the stacked bar track.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the outermost wrapper `div`.

name: Feature Lock
description: Gating overlay that visually locks content behind an upsell prompt.

props.name: plan
props.description: The plan name displayed inside the badge, e.g. `"Pro"` or `"Enterprise"`.

props.name: locked
props.description: When `true` the gating overlay is shown and children are visually obscured. When `false` children are rendered unchanged with no wrapper.

props.name: children
props.description: The content to gate — rendered normally when unlocked.

props.name: title
props.description: Heading shown in the overlay, e.g. `"Upgrade to Pro"`. Accepts any renderable content.

props.name: description
props.description: Supporting body copy shown below the title in the overlay. Accepts any renderable content.

props.name: planLabel
props.description: When provided, a FeatureBadge with this plan name is rendered above the title in the overlay.

props.name: action
props.description: CTA slot — typically an upgrade Button. Rendered below the description inside the overlay.

props.name: blur
props.description: When `true` (default) a `blur-sm` class is applied to the gated content so it is obscured but still hinted at. Set to `false` to skip blurring (e.g. when the content itself is already a placeholder).

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes applied to the outermost wrapper `<div>`.

name: Field
description: Single form field: associates a label, control, description, and error.

props.name: size
props.description: Spacing size that cascades to sub-parts via `group-data-[size=…]/field` selectors.

name: FileUpload
description: A drag-and-drop file upload zone with a browse button and a file list, built on the headless useFileUpload hook and native File APIs.

props.name: isDragging
props.description: Whether a drag is currently hovering — toggles the active styling.

props.name: size
props.description: Density of the dropzone.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class names applied to the list item element.

props.name: file
props.description: The tracked file to display.

props.name: onRemove
props.description: Called when the user clicks the remove button.

props.name: accept
props.description: Accepted MIME types and/or extensions as a comma-separated string (e.g. `"image/*,.pdf"`). When omitted every type is accepted.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class names applied to the outer wrapper.

props.name: defaultFiles
props.description: Files to seed the list with on mount.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the dropzone and browse button.

props.name: label
props.description: Prompt shown inside the dropzone above the browse button.

props.name: maxFiles
props.description: Maximum number of files (only enforced when `multiple`).

props.name: maxSize
props.description: Maximum size per file in bytes.

props.name: multiple
props.description: Allow selecting and dropping multiple files.

props.name: onError
props.description: Called with human-readable messages when files are rejected.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with the full list whenever it changes.

props.name: size
props.description: Density of the dropzone.

name: Filters
description: A faceted filter builder modelled on corr.sh's Filters.

props.name: field
props.description: The FilterFieldConfig whose value is being edited.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback to commit a new set of selected values for this filter.

props.name: operator
props.description: The operator value currently applied to the filter chip.

props.name: values
props.description: Currently selected values for this filter.

props.name: fields
props.description: Field definitions (flat list or grouped) used to resolve chip labels.

props.name: filters
props.description: Controlled list of active Filter chips to render.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the updated filter list whenever a chip is changed or removed.

props.name: allowMultiple
props.description: Allow the same field to be filtered more than once.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes merged onto the root container `<div>`.

props.name: enableShortcut
props.description: Bind a keyboard shortcut that opens the add-filter menu.

props.name: fields
props.description: Field definitions (flat list or grouped).

props.name: filters
props.description: Controlled list of active filters.

props.name: i18n
props.type: Partial< Omit< FilterI18nConfig, "operators" | "placeholders" | "helpers" | "validation" > > & { operators?: Partial<FilterI18nOperators>; placeholders?: Partial<FilterI18nConfig["placeholders"]>; helpers?: Partial<FilterI18nConfig["helpers"]>; validation?: Partial<FilterI18nConfig["validation"]>; }
props.description: Partial i18n overrides merged over DEFAULT_I18N.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called whenever the filter list changes.

props.name: radius
props.description: Chip corner style.

props.name: shortcutKey
props.description: Key for the shortcut.

props.name: shortcutLabel
props.description: Label shown in the trigger's `Kbd` hint.

props.name: showSearchInput
props.description: Show the search box at the top of the field picker.

props.name: size
props.description: Control density.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Replace the default "Add filter" trigger element.

props.name: variant
props.description: Reserved spacing style.

name: Form
description: Root provider for a `@tanstack/react-form` managed form.

props.name: name
props.description: Dot-path of the field within the form's values.

props.name: render
props.description: Render the control. Receives the TanStack `field` API.

props.name: children
props.description: Alternative to `render`: a node or a render function.

props.name: form
props.description: The instance returned by `useForm()`.

props.name: children
props.description: Form content — typically a `<form>` element containing FormFields.

name: Frame
description: A bordered surface that hosts one or more FramePanel children.

props.name: dense
props.description: When `true`, FramePanels drop their inner padding. Useful when the panel's content owns its own padding (e.g. a `<DataGrid>`). Default `false`.

props.name: stacked
props.description: When `true`, sibling FramePanels are joined edge-to-edge with shared borders (no gap, no inner radius between them). Only the first and last panels keep rounded corners. Default `false`.

name: Hover Card
description: Floating preview panel that appears on hover, built on Base UI's `PreviewCard` primitive.

name: ID Cell
description: Table cell that displays a truncated identifier with a copy-to-clipboard button, intended for use inside a data table column definition.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the outermost wrapper `div`.

props.name: id
props.description: Full identifier string to display and copy.

props.name: length
props.description: Number of characters to show before the trailing ellipsis.

name: Input Group
description: A composite control that visually merges an input (or textarea) with leading/trailing addons, icons, buttons, or labels into a single bordered group.

name: Input OTP
description: One-time-password input that renders a fixed-length sequence of digit slots driven by the `input-otp` library.

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Extra classes merged onto the `OTPInput` container `<div>`.

name: Input Password with Strength Indicator
description: A password field that reveals a live strength meter and per-requirement checklist after the user first focuses the input.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional `<Label>` rendered above the input; linked via `htmlFor={id}`. Requires `id` to be set on the component for the association to work.

props.name: error
props.description: When `true`, applies a destructive border and forces `aria-invalid` regardless of the computed strength score.

props.name: showStrengthIndicator
props.description: When `false`, hides the strength progress bar and requirements checklist, rendering the field as a plain show/hide password input.

name: Input with Addons
description: A text input flanked by optional muted addon panels for contextual prefix or suffix labels (e.g. protocol, domain extension, or unit).

props.name: leading
props.description: Content rendered in the muted panel before the input (e.g. `"https://"` or a currency symbol). Omit to suppress the leading addon.

props.name: trailing
props.description: Content rendered in the muted panel after the input (e.g. `".com"` or a unit label). Omit to suppress the trailing addon.

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the outer bordered wrapper `<div>`.

name: Input with Inline Button
description: A text input with an attached button fused to its trailing edge, suitable for search bars, coupon fields, and newsletter sign-ups.

props.name: button
props.description: Custom element rendered instead of the built-in Button.

props.name: buttonText
props.description: Label text rendered inside the built-in Button.

props.name: onButtonClick
props.description: Click handler forwarded to the built-in Button.

props.name: buttonClassName
props.description: Extra classes merged onto the button or its container element.

props.name: buttonAriaLabel
props.description: `aria-label` for the built-in Button when `buttonText` is insufficient.

props.name: wrapperClassName
props.description: Extra classes merged onto the outer flex wrapper `<div>`.

props.name: buttonType
props.description: HTML `type` attribute of the built-in Button.

name: Input with Inner Tags
description: A tag-input field that renders inline Tag badges inside the input area, letting users build a list of values within a single control.

props.name: id
props.description: `id` forwarded to the inner `<Input>` for external `<label htmlFor>`.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown in the inner `<Input>` when no value is typed.

props.name: tags
props.description: Controlled list of current tags; update via onTagsChange.

props.name: onTagsChange
props.description: Called with the full updated tag list after every add or remove action.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the inner `<Input>` and all remove buttons.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes merged onto the inner `<Input>` element.

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Extra classes merged onto the outermost container `<div>`.

name: Input with Loader
description: A text input that swaps its leading icon for an animated loading spinner while an async operation is in progress.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: When `true`, replaces the icon slot with an animated spinner.

props.name: icon
props.description: Decorative node rendered at the leading edge; replaced by the spinner while `isLoading` is `true`.

props.name: endIcon
props.description: Node rendered as a clickable button at the trailing edge of the input (e.g. a clear or submit icon). Requires endIconAriaLabel.

props.name: onEndIconClick
props.description: Click handler forwarded to the trailing-edge button wrapping endIcon.

props.name: endIconAriaLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the trailing-edge endIcon button; required by screen readers when using an icon-only affordance.

name: Input with Show/Hide Password
description: A minimal password field with a trailing eye-icon toggle that switches the input between masked (`"password"`) and revealed (`"text"`) mode.

name: Input with Start Icon
description: A text input with a decorative, non-interactive icon pinned to the leading edge — the standard pattern for search bars and filtered inputs.

props.name: icon
props.description: Decorative node overlaid at the leading edge of the input; rendered `pointer-events-none` so it never intercepts clicks or focus.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional `<label>` text rendered above the input and linked via `htmlFor={props.id}`; requires `id` to be set for the association.

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the relative wrapper `<div>` that contains the input and the icon overlay.

name: Input
description: A single-line text control for user input.

name: Item
description: Flexible row-level container for list entries, menu rows, or card-like tiles in an ItemGroup.

name: JSON Viewer
description: Hand-rolled recursive, collapsible, colorised JSON tree viewer.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class names applied to the root element.

props.name: copyable
props.description: When `true`, a CopyButton is shown in the top-right corner.

props.name: data
props.description: The JSON-serialisable value to display.

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Controls how deep the tree is initially expanded. - `true` — expand all nodes. - `false` — collapse all nodes. - `number` — expand nodes whose depth is less than this value (root = 0).

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Constrains the viewer height. Accepts any CSS `max-height` value or a pixel number.

props.name: rootLabel
props.description: Optional label rendered at the top-left of the root node.

name: Kbd
description: Renders a single keyboard key badge using the semantic `<kbd>` element.

name: Label
description: Accessible label for a form control.

props.name: size
props.description: Text size of the label. - `sm` — `text-xs` - `default` — `text-sm` (unchanged) - `lg` — `text-base`

props.name: required
props.description: When `true`, appends an `aria-hidden` red asterisk after the label text to signal that the associated control is required.

name: Leaderboard
description: Root of a Leaderboard. A vertical stack of ranked rows, each with a value-proportional fill bar behind its label.

props.name: children
props.description: Row content, or a render-prop receiving `{ value, percentage }`.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: Upper bound of the scale. Defaults to `100`.

props.name: minValue
props.description: Lower bound of the scale. Defaults to `0`.

props.name: onAction
props.description: Makes the row a button and fires on click/Enter/Space.

props.name: value
props.description: The row's value, used to size the fill bar.

name: Menubar
description: A horizontal bar of labeled menu triggers, each opening a dropdown panel.

name: Metric Card
description: Self-contained metric summary card with an optional delta indicator and sparkline.

props.name: title
props.description: Card heading text.

props.name: value
props.description: The primary numeric or text value to highlight.

props.name: delta
props.description: Optional delta / change indicator. `direction` defaults to `"up"` when `value >= 0` and `"down"` otherwise. Pass `"neutral"` for flat trends.

props.name: icon
props.description: Trailing icon rendered in the header beside `title`.

props.name: description
props.description: Muted description line below the delta.

props.name: data
props.description: Numeric series rendered as a mini sparkline at the bottom of the card.

props.name: color
props.description: Sparkline bar fill color. Defaults to `var(--chart-1)`.

props.name: size
props.description: Layout size of the card.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes merged onto the root `<Card>` element.

props.name: children
props.description: Additional content rendered after the description line, before the sparkline.

name: MultiSelect
description: A multi-value combobox that lets users select (and optionally create) multiple options from a searchable dropdown list.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled selection; keep in sync via onChange.

props.name: defaultOptions
props.description: Initial options shown in the dropdown before any search.

props.name: options
props.description: manually controlled options

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Input placeholder text shown when no options are selected.

props.name: loadingIndicator
props.description: Loading component.

props.name: emptyIndicator
props.description: Empty component.

props.name: delay
props.description: Debounce time for async search. Only work with `onSearch`.

props.name: triggerSearchOnFocus
props.description: Only work with `onSearch` prop. Trigger search when `onFocus`. For example, when user click on the input, it will trigger the search to get initial options.

props.name: onSearch
props.description: async search

props.name: onSearchSync
props.description: sync search. This search will not showing loadingIndicator. The rest props are the same as async search. i.e.: creatable, groupBy, delay.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the full updated selection whenever options are added or removed.

props.name: maxSelected
props.description: Limit the maximum number of selected options.

props.name: onMaxSelected
props.description: When the number of selected options exceeds the limit, the onMaxSelected will be called.

props.name: hidePlaceholderWhenSelected
props.description: Hide the placeholder when there are options selected.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the control; pointer events are blocked and opacity is reduced.

props.name: groupBy
props.description: Group the options base on provided key.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes merged onto the outer input wrapper element.

props.name: badgeClassName
props.description: Extra classes merged onto each selected-option badge chip.

props.name: selectFirstItem
props.description: First item selected is a default behavior by cmdk. That is why the default is true. This is a workaround solution by add a dummy item.

props.name: creatable
props.description: Allow user to create option when there is no option matched.

props.name: commandProps
props.description: Props of `Command`

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Props of `CommandInput`

props.name: hideClearAllButton
props.description: hide the clear all button.

props.name: size
props.description: Size axis controlling control height and chip size.

name: Native Select
description: A styled wrapper around the native `<select>` element.

props.name: size
props.description: Height preset for the select control. - `sm` — 28 px tall, tighter border radius. - `default` — 32 px tall (unchanged default). - `lg` — 40 px tall, slightly larger text.

name: NavigationMenu
description: Horizontal navigation bar with flyout content panels.

name: NavigationRail
description: A fixed-width vertical nav column that holds icon-only navigation items.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the footer (typically a profile item).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class names merged onto the footer wrapper.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the header (typically a logo or app icon).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class names merged onto the header wrapper.

props.name: icon
props.description: Hugeicons SVG element rendered as the button icon.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible text shown in the tooltip and as `sr-only` content.

props.name: href
props.description: Optional URL; pass when the item should behave as an anchor.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler for the icon button.

props.name: isActive
props.description: Marks the item as the currently active route.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables pointer events and reduces opacity when `true`.

props.name: badge
props.description: Optional indicator node (e.g. `<Ping>`) absolutely positioned at the top-right corner of the button.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Side of the layout the rail is anchored to; flips border and order.

props.name: children
props.description: NavigationRailItem elements to render in this group.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class names merged onto the section wrapper.

name: Notice Banner
description: Thin re-export shim — all logic now lives in /banner.

name: Number Input Percentage with Chevrons
description: A percentage number input (0–100 %) with stacked up/down chevron buttons, formatted with React Aria's `NumberField`.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initial percentage value (0–100) used when the input is uncontrolled.

props.name: name
props.description: `aria-label` base and `name` attribute forwarded to the inner `Input`.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled percentage value (0–100); converted to 0–1 internally.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new integer percentage (0–100) on every change.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the entire `NumberField` including the chevron buttons.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label text applied to the `NumberField` and inner `Input`.

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Extra classes applied to the outer `Group` container element.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls the height of the input group. Defaults to `"default"` (h-8).

name: Number Input with Buttons
description: A stepper-style number input with flanking decrement (−) and increment (+) buttons rendered on the left and right edges.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value passed to the underlying `NumberField`.

props.name: name
props.description: `name` attribute of the hidden input; also used as the aria-label base.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value passed to the underlying `NumberField`.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new numeric value whenever it changes.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum allowed value; forwarded to `NumberField` as `minValue`.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum allowed value; forwarded to `NumberField` as `maxValue`.

props.name: step
props.description: Amount to increment/decrement per step. Defaults to `1`.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the entire field when `true`.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label; used as `aria-label` on both the field and the input.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes merged onto the inner `<Input>` element.

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Extra classes merged onto the `<Group>` wrapper element.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls the height of the input group. Defaults to `"default"` (h-8).

name: Number Input with Chevrons
description: A number input with stacked up/down chevron buttons in a trailing column, supporting arbitrary `Intl.NumberFormatOptions` formatting.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value passed to the underlying `NumberField`.

props.name: name
props.description: `name` attribute of the hidden input; also used as the aria-label base.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value passed to the underlying `NumberField`.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new numeric value whenever it changes.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum allowed value; forwarded to `NumberField` as `minValue`.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum allowed value; forwarded to `NumberField` as `maxValue`.

props.name: step
props.description: Amount to increment/decrement per step. Defaults to `1`.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the entire field when `true`.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label; used as `aria-label` on both the field and the input.

props.name: formatOptions
props.description: `Intl.NumberFormatOptions` forwarded to React Aria's formatter (e.g. `{ style: "currency", currency: "USD" }`).

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Extra classes merged onto the `<Group>` wrapper element.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls the height of the input group. Defaults to `"default"` (h-8).

name: Pagination
description: Accessible navigation landmark for moving between pages of content.

props.name: size
props.description: Scales all page-button controls uniformly.

name: Password Input
description: A password field with an inline toggle button that reveals or masks the entered text.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional `<label>` text rendered above the input and linked via `htmlFor={props.id}`; requires `id` to be set.

props.name: showPasswordLabel
props.description: `aria-label` for the toggle button when password is currently visible; announcing the action to screen readers.

props.name: hidePasswordLabel
props.description: `aria-label` for the toggle button when password is currently hidden; announcing the action to screen readers.

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the relative wrapper `<div>` that contains the input and the visibility-toggle button.

name: Phone Input
description: An international phone number field composed of a flag/country-code selector and a number text input that formats as the user types.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the formatted E.164 phone number string as the user types; receives an empty string instead of `undefined` for partial inputs.

props.name: onCountryChange
props.description: Called whenever the user selects a different country in the CountrySelect popover.

props.name: variant
props.description: Height of the field and country button — `"sm"` | `"default"` | `"lg"` (default `"default"`).

props.name: popupClassName
props.description: Extra classes merged onto the country-selector popover content.

name: Popover
description: Floating panel anchored to a trigger element for rich non-modal content.

name: Preview Card
description: A hover-activated floating card that previews rich content for a trigger element, built on Base UI's `PreviewCard` primitives.

name: Progress
description: Determinate progress bar that displays a numeric completion percentage.

name: QR Code
description: Root component that renders an SVG QR code and provides context to all child sub-components.

props.name: filename
props.description: Base filename (without extension) for the downloaded file.

props.name: format
props.description: Export format. - `"svg"` — lossless vector, works in all environments. - `"png"` — rasterised at the QR code's native `size`.

props.name: children
props.description: Logo, icon, or any content to display centred over the QR code.

props.name: bgColor
props.description: Background colour for the QR code modules. Defaults to the library default (`#ffffff`).

props.name: children
props.description: Nested content — typically QRCodeOverlay and/or QRCodeDownload.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the wrapper `<div>`.

props.name: fgColor
props.description: Foreground colour for the QR code modules. Defaults to the library default (`#000000`).

props.name: level
props.description: Reed–Solomon error-correction level. - `"L"` — 7 % correction (highest data density) - `"M"` — 15 % correction (default) - `"Q"` — 25 % correction - `"H"` — 30 % correction (lowest data density — required when using QRCodeOverlay)

props.name: margin
props.description: Quiet-zone margin expressed in QR *modules* (not pixels).

props.name: size
props.description: Pixel size of the rendered QR code square.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline style overrides for the wrapper `<div>`.

props.name: title
props.description: Accessible name for the QR code `<svg>` (rendered as an SVG `<title>`). A QR code is meaningful content a screen reader cannot otherwise convey, so it always carries an accessible name.

props.name: value
props.description: The data to encode into the QR code (e.g. a URL or plain text).

props.name: size
props.description: Pixel size of the skeleton square — should match the intended QRCode `size`.

name: Radial Gauge
description: Circular radial-bar gauge that fills proportionally to a `value / max` ratio.

props.name: value
props.description: Current value to display.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum possible value. Defaults to `100`.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional label rendered beneath the center percentage.

props.name: centerLabel
props.description: Replaces the default `"N%"` text rendered in the center of the gauge.

props.name: color
props.description: Explicit fill color; overrides threshold-based color selection.

props.name: thresholds
props.description: Thresholds used to pick warning/danger colors automatically.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class names merged onto the outermost gauge wrapper div.

name: Radio Group
description: A group of mutually exclusive radio options.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of each radio circle. Cascades to all nested RadioGroupItems via `group-data-[size=…]/radio-group` selectors.

name: Range Calendar With Presets
description: A range calendar with a row of quick-select preset buttons and an optional apply/reset footer.

props.name: selected
props.description: The selected date range.

props.name: _defaultRange
props.description: The default date range.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Callback fired when the date range changes.

props.name: className
props.description: The class name for the root element.

props.name: presets
props.description: Custom presets to show in the sidebar. If not provided, default presets will be used.

props.name: disableFutureDates
props.description: Whether to disable future dates.

props.name: onApply
props.description: Callback fired when the apply button is clicked.

props.name: onReset
props.description: Callback fired when the reset button is clicked.

props.name: showFooter
props.description: Whether to show the apply and reset buttons.

props.name: numberOfMonths
props.description: The number of months to display in the calendar.

props.name: showOutsideDays
props.description: Whether to show outside days in the calendar.

name: Rating
description: A star rating input that supports controlled, uncontrolled, read-only, and disabled modes.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible name for the root element (`role="radiogroup"` or `role="img"`).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes forwarded to the root element.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initial rating value for uncontrolled usage.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When `true` the component is non-interactive and visually dimmed.

props.name: max
props.description: Total number of stars rendered.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Callback fired whenever the selected rating changes. Receives the newly selected star index (1‥max).

props.name: readOnly
props.description: When `true` the component renders as a non-interactive display element with `role="img"`.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled current rating value. When provided the component is fully controlled; pair with `onValueChange` to track changes.

name: Relative Time Card
description: Shows a compact, formatted timestamp that — on hover — reveals a card with the live relative time and the same instant rendered across one or more timezones (plus the viewer's local zone).

props.name: date
props.description: The date to display. Accepts a `Date`, an ISO string, or a numeric epoch timestamp — all are normalised via `new Date(date)`.

props.name: timezones
props.description: IANA time-zone identifiers shown as rows in the card. The viewer's local timezone is always appended as a final row.

props.name: updateInterval
props.description: How often (ms) the relative-time string in the card refreshes.

props.name: children
props.description: Custom trigger label. When omitted, the trigger shows the formatted absolute timestamp (e.g. "Jun 1, 2024, 12:00 PM").

name: Resizable
description: Drag handle separator between two ResizablePanel elements.

name: Scroll Area
description: A cross-browser custom scroll container with styled overlaid scrollbars.

name: Scrollspy
description: Tracks the section currently in view and marks its corresponding navigation anchor with `data-active="true"`. Anchors opt in via `data-{dataAttribute}-anchor="<section-id>"`; clicking one smooth-scrolls to its section and (optionally) updates the URL hash.

props.name: children
props.description: The navigation links to track; anchors carry `data-{dataAttribute}-anchor`.

props.name: dataAttribute
props.description: The data-attribute namespace used to find anchors and apply offsets, e.g. `"scrollspy"` looks for `data-scrollspy-anchor`. Defaults to `"scrollspy"`.

props.name: history
props.description: When `true` (default), the active section id is synced to the URL hash.

props.name: offset
props.description: Pixels subtracted from each section's offset before comparing against the scroll position. Override per anchor with `data-{dataAttribute}-offset`.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Called with the active section id whenever the active anchor changes.

props.name: smooth
props.description: When `true` (default), click-to-scroll uses smooth scrolling.

props.name: targetRef
props.description: The scroll container to observe. Defaults to the document/window when omitted. Pass a ref to a scrollable element (or one wrapping a `data-slot="scroll-area-viewport"`) to spy inside it.

name: Secret Input
description: A controlled text input purpose-built for secrets and API keys.

props.name: value
props.description: The controlled secret value written to the input.

props.name: revealable
props.description: When `true` (default), a ghost icon button on the trailing edge lets the user flip between masked and plain-text display.

props.name: copyable
props.description: When `true` (default), a CopyButton is rendered on the trailing edge so the user can copy the secret without revealing it.

name: Select Native
description: Styled wrapper around the browser's native `<select>` element.

name: Select With Search And Button
description: A searchable single-select dropdown with a persistent action button pinned below the option list, typically used for inline "Add new …" creation flows.

props.name: options
props.description: List of options to display in the searchable dropdown.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected value; drives controlled mode.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with the new value when the user selects or deselects an option.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Text shown in the trigger button when no option is selected.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label rendered above the trigger via Label.

props.name: searchPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder inside the search CommandInput.

props.name: noResultsText
props.description: Message shown by CommandEmpty when no options match the search.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the outermost wrapper `div`.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When `true`, the trigger button is disabled and non-interactive.

props.name: error
props.description: When `true`, renders the trigger border in `destructive` color.

props.name: required
props.description: When `true`, appends a red asterisk to the label.

props.name: name
props.description: `name` / `id` forwarded to the trigger button element.

props.name: buttonText
props.description: Label text rendered inside the action button below the option list.

props.name: onButtonClick
props.description: Called when the user clicks the action button; also closes the dropdown.

props.name: buttonIcon
props.default:
(
    <HugeiconsIcon
      aria-hidden="true"
      className="-ms-2 me-2 size-4 opacity-60"
      icon={Add01Icon}
    />
  )
props.description: Icon node rendered to the left of `buttonText` inside the action button.

name: Select With Search
description: A searchable single-select dropdown that virtualizes its option list for large datasets and supports server-side pagination.

props.name: options
props.description: List of options to render in the virtualized dropdown list.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected value; drives controlled mode.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with the new value when the user selects an option.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Text shown in the trigger button when no option is selected.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label rendered above the trigger via Label.

props.name: searchPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder inside the search CommandInput.

props.name: noResultsText
props.description: Message shown by CommandEmpty when the option list is empty.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the outermost wrapper `div`.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When `true`, the trigger button is disabled and non-interactive.

props.name: error
props.description: When `true`, renders the trigger border in `destructive` color.

props.name: required
props.description: When `true`, appends a red asterisk to the label.

props.name: name
props.description: Native `name` attribute forwarded to the trigger button element.

props.name: onSearchChange
props.description: Called with the current search string on every keystroke.

props.name: id
props.description: `id` forwarded to the trigger button; falls back to `name`.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called with the new open state whenever the popover opens or closes.

props.name: onEndReached
props.description: Called by `Virtuoso` when the user scrolls to the bottom of the list.

props.name: renderOption
props.description: Custom renderer for each option row; receives the option and selection state.

props.name: renderSelectedOption
props.description: Custom renderer for the selected value shown inside the trigger button.

props.name: renderLoading
props.description: Renders a loading indicator used both for initial load and next-page fetches.

props.name: renderEmpty
props.description: Renders empty-state content when `options` is empty and not loading.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: When `true`, shows `renderLoading` instead of the option list.

props.name: isFetchingNextPage
props.description: When `true`, appends the `renderLoading` footer below the virtualized list.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls the size variant passed to the trigger Button.

name: Select
description: Accessible single-value dropdown built on Base UI's `Select` primitive.

props.name: size
props.description: Height / border-radius scale of the trigger button.

name: Separator
description: A thin dividing line between sections of content.

name: Sheet
description: Edge-anchored sliding panel built on Base UI's Dialog primitive.

name: Shell
description: Top-level page layout wrapper that applies consistent padding, gap, and flex-column structure to a page or route section.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the wrapper `<div>`.

props.name: variant
props.description: Layout preset applied via shellVariants. - `"default"` — full-width with responsive horizontal padding. - `"centered"` — adds `items-center` to horizontally centre children. - `"fluid"` — identical to `"default"` for unrestricted-width layouts.

name: Sidebar
description: The sidebar panel itself — a collapsible column rendered inside a SidebarProvider.

props.name: side
props.description: Viewport edge the panel anchors to; `"left"` (default) or `"right"`.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual treatment of the sidebar surface. - `"sidebar"` — flat panel flush with the viewport edge (default). - `"floating"` — rounded corners and a shadow ring. - `"inset"` — makes the content area (SidebarInset) appear nested inside the sidebar colour.

props.name: collapsible
props.description: Collapse mode when the sidebar is toggled closed. - `"offcanvas"` — slides the panel fully off-screen (default). - `"icon"` — shrinks to icon width, hiding labels. - `"none"` — disables collapsing; the panel is always visible.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Initial open state when uncontrolled; defaults to `true`.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state; pair with onOpenChange.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when the sidebar's open state changes in controlled mode.

name: Skeleton
description: Pulsing placeholder used while content is loading.

name: Slider
description: A range-input control for selecting a numeric value (or range of values) by dragging one or more thumbs along a track.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible name forwarded to every thumb input. Omit when the slider is associated with a `<FieldLabel>` via Base UI's `Field` context.

name: Sortable
description: Drag-to-reorder container built on dnd-kit. Wraps its children in a `DndContext` + `SortableContext` and renders a floating overlay that mirrors the actively dragged SortableItem.

props.name: cursor
props.description: When `true` (default), applies `cursor-grab` / `cursor-grabbing` to signal draggability. Set `false` to manage the cursor yourself.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When `true`, the item cannot be dragged and is dimmed.
