props.name: value
props.description: Stable id for this item; must equal `getItemValue(item)` on the parent Sortable.

props.name: getItemValue
props.description: Derives the stable string id for an item. Must match the `value` passed to the corresponding SortableItem.

props.name: modifiers
props.description: dnd-kit modifiers applied to both the drag and the overlay.

props.name: onDragEnd
props.description: Forwarded to dnd-kit's `DndContext` `onDragEnd` (fires before reorder).

props.name: onDragStart
props.description: Forwarded to dnd-kit's `DndContext` `onDragStart`.

props.name: onMove
props.type: (event: { event: DragEndEvent; activeIndex: number; overIndex: number; }) => void
props.description: Escape hatch invoked instead of the built-in `arrayMove`. Receives the raw drag event plus the resolved source/target indices, letting you run a custom reorder (e.g. server-synced). When provided, `onValueChange` is **not** called automatically.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with the reordered list after a successful drag.

props.name: strategy
props.description: Layout strategy used for measuring/reflowing during a drag. `"vertical"` (default) for stacked lists, `"horizontal"` for rows, and `"grid"` for wrapped two-dimensional grids.

props.name: value
props.description: The ordered list of items rendered as SortableItems.

name: Spinner
description: Animated loading indicator built on the HugeIcons `Loading03` glyph.

name: Status Badge
description: A Badge that maps an orchestration status keyword to a consistent colour, a leading status dot, and a humanised label.

props.name: status
props.description: The status keyword, e.g. `"running"`, `"failed"`, `"timed_out"`.

props.name: showDot
props.description: Show the leading coloured dot. Defaults to `true`.

props.name: label
props.description: Override the rendered text; defaults to a humanised `status`.

props.name: pulse
props.description: When `true`, renders an `animate-ping` ring behind the dot to signal a "live" or real-time state.

props.name: dotOnly
props.description: When `true`, renders only the dot with no visible text label.

name: Stepper
description: A multi-step progress indicator that tracks which step is currently active.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initial active step index used in uncontrolled mode; ignored when value is provided.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled active step index; when set the component skips internal state and defers all updates to `onValueChange`.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with the new step index whenever a StepperTrigger is clicked or `setActiveStep` is invoked programmatically.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout direction; cascades to all sub-components via `data-orientation`.

props.name: size
props.description: Scaling preset that controls indicator size and label text. - `"default"` — `size-8` indicator, `text-sm` labels (existing behaviour). - `"sm"` — `size-6` indicator, `text-xs` labels.

props.name: compact
props.description: When `true`, applies tighter gap between items and a shorter connector (`h-8` vertical / `h-px` horizontal) for space-constrained layouts.

name: Switch
description: A toggle control that switches between on and off states.

props.name: size
props.description: Physical size of the switch track and thumb.

props.name: intent
props.description: Colour intent of the checked track. - `"default"` — uses the `primary` token (unchanged from before). - `"destructive"` — uses `bg-destructive` when checked.

name: Table
description: Responsive data table with a horizontally scrollable container.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls cell height and padding for all TableHead and TableCell elements via a `data-size` attribute on the container div. - `sm` — `h-6 px-1.5 text-xs` (compact) - `default` — `h-7 px-2 text-sm` (unchanged) - `lg` — `h-9 px-3 text-sm` (spacious)

name: Tabs
description: Layered content panel controlled by a row (or column) of tab buttons.

name: Tag Group
description: An accessible group container for a set of selectable or removable tags.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional Tailwind classes merged onto the wrapper `<div>`.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional label text or element rendered above the tag list.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional Tailwind classes merged onto the tag element.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant. Defaults to `"default"`.

name: Textarea
description: A multi-line text control for longer user input.

name: Timeline
description: Stepped progress tracker that renders a sequence of labeled events.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional Hugeicons icon rendered centered inside the indicator bubble. When present, the indicator automatically becomes a flex-center container. Takes precedence over `children` in render order (rendered first).

props.name: step
props.description: 1-based index of this step; compared against the active step to set `data-completed`.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initial active step index (uncontrolled). Defaults to `1`.

props.name: value
props.description: Active step index (controlled).

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called when the active step changes.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Direction of the step track. Defaults to `"vertical"`.

props.name: variant
props.description: Connector line rendering style. - `"solid"` (default) — filled bar using `bg-*` classes. - `"dotted"` — dashed border line drawn via `border-*` + `border-dashed`.

props.name: intent
props.description: Colour intent applied to completed-step indicators and separators. Defaults to `"primary"`.

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset for indicators, gaps, and text. - `"default"` — existing proportions (no change). - `"sm"` — smaller indicator (`size-4`), tighter gaps, smaller text.

name: Toggle Group
description: A managed group of ToggleGroupItem controls, handling single or multiple selection and keyboard navigation.

props.name: spacing
props.description: Pixel gap between items, passed as `--gap` CSS custom property. When `0` (default), items are fused edge-to-edge with shared borders collapsed.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout direction of the group. - `"horizontal"` — items are arranged in a row (default). - `"vertical"` — items are stacked in a column. Note: `aria-orientation` is suppressed because `role="group"` does not permit that attribute.

name: Toggle
description: A two-state button that toggles between pressed and unpressed.

name: Tooltip
description: Short, non-interactive label that appears near an element on hover or focus, built on Base UI's `Tooltip` primitive.

name: Tracker
description: A compact status timeline — a row of small colored blocks, each with an optional hover tooltip. Ideal for uptime, build history, or any per-period status strip (à la a status-page incident bar).

props.name: color
props.description: Tailwind background class for this block (e.g. `"bg-success"`).

props.name: defaultBackgroundColor
props.description: Background class used when `color` is omitted.

props.name: disabledTooltip
props.description: Skip the tooltip entirely for this block.

props.name: key
props.description: Stable React key when the data has no natural id.

props.name: tooltip
props.description: Tooltip label shown on hover/focus.

props.name: data
props.description: Ordered list of blocks to render left-to-right.

props.name: defaultBackgroundColor
props.description: Background class for blocks that omit their own `color`.

name: Tree
description: A hierarchical tree view for displaying nested data with support for keyboard navigation, single/multiple selection, and expand/collapse.

props.name: children
props.description: Nested `<TreeItem>` elements that form the item's children.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional leading icon rendered before the label.

props.name: textValue
props.description: Typeahead / accessibility string for the row.

props.name: title
props.description: The visible label for the row.
